title: begonia johnstonii
intro: Begonia johnstonii, also known as the Johnston's Begonia, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Begonia genus. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Begonia johnstonii are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from headaches, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Begonia johnstonii may be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
